message:
feat: multi-agent collaborative updates batch

Telemetry (bd-1z02.5):
- Add in-memory exporter tests for span verification
- Trace ID validation and configuration parsing tests
- Apply rustfmt to redact module conditionals

Widgets:
- TableState: implement Stateful trait for persistence
- Add TablePersistState struct with selected/offset fields
- Add with_persistence_id() builder and state_key() method

Demo showcase:
- data_viz.rs: integrate heatmap_gradient() visualization
- chrome.rs: minor help overlay refinements
- mouse_playground.rs: adjust layout and interactions

Testing:
- widget_snapshots.rs: add comprehensive widget rendering tests

Core:
- terminal_capabilities.rs: refine profile builder API
- program.rs: adjust tracing span attributes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
